disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Completely chalk-white, sharply-demarcated, smooth (non-scaly, non-tender) symmetrical patches with a patch of white hairs (leukotrichia)
trigger_question_examples: Are the patches completely chalk-white with sharp edges, smooth (no scale) and symmetrical, with any white hairs in them?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, completely chalk-white with sharp edges, smooth and symmetrical, and there's a patch of white hairs in one eyebrow.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Normal sensation within the patches, no scaling and no thickened nerves (infective-mimic screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is the feeling/sensation normal in the white patches, and is there any scaling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The feeling is normal in the patches and there's no scaling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute panic/hyperventilation; screen for thoughts of self-harm
trigger_question_examples: This is really distressing — are you having any thoughts of harming yourself?
Do you feel safe right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No thoughts of harming myself — I'm just overwhelmed and frightened about how I look.

patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is this a flesh-eating or infectious disease eating my skin?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: De-escalate calmly; after confirming the chalk-white smooth symmetrical pattern (and normal sensation/no scale), reassure clearly that this is benign vitiligo (autoimmune pigment loss), not an infection or 'flesh-eating' disease. Support the acute panic, advise sun protection, and arrange routine autoimmune screening/psychological support.
